title: Tomato
steps: In a giant soup pot - saute onions and carrots for a few minutes to soften them up
Add veggie broth - bring to a boil then quickly lower to a simmer and cook till the onion and carrot are soft
Add cans of diced tomatoes, garlic, spices, salt, pepper, maple syrup, and cashew butter - cook for a few more minutes
With your immersion blender - blend it all up
Top it off with several basil leaves and enjoy

ingredients.name: Spices, Salt, Pepper
ingredients.amount: Whatever you want - paprika, garlic, onion, oregano, marjoram, etc.
